description: A customer wants to apply a gift card to their purchase during checkout.

nodes.task_description: Take the gift card code from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the gift card code.

nodes.task_description: Validate the gift card code and check its balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the gift card is valid and has a balance of $50.

nodes.task_description: Apply the gift card balance to the order total.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully discounts the order total by $50.
